post_content: Operating since 1979, affiliated with Lone Butte Fish and Wildlife Association. Indoor archery bay and outdoor range. Hosts one of BC's largest archery shoots. Wed 7 PM shoots (until temps below -10C). $50 adult / $40 youth / $35 child membership. $10 adult / $2 junior guest fee.

post_title: Starr Archery (Abbotsford Fish and Game Club)
post_content: Premier archery facility serving Abbotsford and Mission. 20-yard indoor range (winter) and 70-yard outdoor range with 3D trail (summer). Home of Sagittarius Archers sub-club with Wed night drop-in sessions. Expert coaching and youth program available.

Serving community since 1953. Outdoor archery range with Archery for Kids program on Saturday mornings (seasonal coached sessions). Range open 8:30 AM to dusk. $90 adult / $100 family membership. $5 guest fee (with member) or $10 non-member drop-in for kids.
business_hours: Sat 10 AM-12 PM (kids); 8:30 AM to dusk

post_content: Members-only outdoor range in Burnaby Lake Regional Park. Year-round dawn to dusk access. Requires own equipment. $110 individual / $220 family membership. Not accepting new memberships until April 2026 due to overwhelming demand (500+ applications). No drop-ins, rentals, or lessons.
Outdoor range in the Peace region. Wed 7-9 PM and Sun 2-4 PM sessions. $250 individual / $400 family / $120 junior membership. $10 drop-in fee. Serves Charlie Lake and Fort St John area archers.
Indoor and outdoor archery ranges. Thursday night shoots 5-7 PM. Women's Introduction to Archery program available. Active archery section suitable for all experience levels.

Affiliated with Port Coquitlam & District Hunting and Fishing Club. 18m indoor range and outdoor facilities. Junior Olympian Program (JOP) and indoor drop-in nights. $155 individual / $200 family PCDHFC membership. Crossbows under 350fps allowed.

post_title: Courtenay & District Fish & Game Protective Assoc.
post_content: Vancouver Island archery destination. Outdoor field range 10-70 yards plus 3km 3D archery trail. Old Archers Cabin with wood stove. Open House first Sunday of month 10am-2pm. JOP youth program available. Approx $200/year membership.

Premier archery in the Kootenays. Indoor 18m range and outdoor range. Club Night Tue 7-9PM. Youth programs and JOP. Affiliated with Archery Canada and BC Archery. $15 individual / $25 family + BC Archery fee.

Vancouver Island archery hub. 10-lane indoor 18m range, 3-acre outdoor target range, and 16-target field course. Family Night drop-in Tue 6-7:15PM and Thu 6-8PM ($5 includes equipment). JOP on Monday nights. $150 adult / $200 family / $100 senior.
Mountain archery in the Kootenays. Indoor range popular in winter, outdoor 3D fun shoots in summer. $60 adult / $80 family + $40 indoor range access.

post_title: New Totem Archery Club - Indoor Range
post_content: Northern BC archery hub. Indoor 20-yard lanes and outdoor 20-target 3D course with 10-60 yard field ranges. Wed 6:45-8:30 PM and Sun 2-4 PM. Basic and intermediate instruction available ($30-$60). $250 adult / $400 family / $120 junior.

Dual-facility setup. 10-lane 18m indoor range downtown and hillside outdoor range (dawn to dusk). Tue 6:30-8 PM and Sun 5-9 PM indoor sessions. Beginners Intro Courses and Junior Archery program. $185.40 single / $226.60 family. Digital punchcard drop-in $6.50 adult.

post_title: The Feathered Fletch Archery School & Range
post_content: Archery academy with indoor and outdoor instruction. Mon-Sat 8 AM-7 PM. Workshops summer camps and group events (up to 30 shooters). Full courses $245-$280. Workshop drop-in $55. Summer shoots $15.

One of largest clubs in the Okanagan. Indoor range, outdoor 3D course, and field range. Weekdays 9AM-8PM, weekends 9AM-5PM. JOP and adult archery leagues. $355 adult+spouse / $405 family / $65 junior. $25 adult guest (with member).

post_title: Langley Archers / HD Stafford Archery Club
post_content: Indoor archery club operating out of HD Stafford Middle School in Langley. Beginner courses, Junior Olympian Program, and coaching sessions. Open to all skill levels. $70 adult / $150 family. $5 drop-in. Equipment rental $5/session.

Indoor and outdoor archery ranges. Office Wed 11-7:30, Fri-Sun 10/11-4:30. Indoor Sun 5-7 PM & Wed. Outdoor 9AM-Dusk. $236.25 adult/family + insurance. $10 non-member / $6 member drop-in. Beginner lessons available.

Seasonal facilities. Indoor at Maple Ridge Leisure Centre (Oct-Apr) and outdoor at Selvey Park (May-Sept). Try-it Nights for beginners. JOP program. Indoor Thu 6:30-8:30 PM, Sun 6:30-8 PM. Outdoor Tue/Thu 5-8 PM, Sat 8 AM-1 PM. $165-$440 membership. $35 Try-it Night.

Outdoor range up to 70 yards with summer 3D course. Office Tue-Fri 10:30 AM-5:30 PM. Archery Practice Thu 6-8 PM. Archery for Beginners program 4th Thu of month 6-7 PM. $165 individual / $190 family. $20 adult guest (with member).
Mobile archery tag and archery lesson service based in Salmon Arm, serving the North Okanagan and Kamloops areas. Birthdays, corporate events, youth celebrations. Individual lessons available.
West Kootenays archery destination. Indoor range (5 archers) and outdoor range with 14 stations/15 targets. Saturday morning beginner sessions 11 AM-Noon. $85 individual / $110 family / $30 junior.

World-renowned archery destination since 1964. Pro shop and indoor range. Tue-Sat 9:30 AM-5 PM. Private/group lessons $45-$60/hr. Adult 4-week course $119.99. Drop-in $20-$25. Shooter Cards available.
Indoor pop-up range at Brockton School gym. Tue 7-9 PM and Sat 10:30 AM-12:30 PM. Beginner intro lesson $35 (1.5 hrs, equipment provided). $75 adult / $45 junior / $130 family + BCAA fee.

Indoor range at Air Cadet Building and outdoor range open 365 days. Outdoor 8AM-9PM, Indoor Mon & Thu nights from 6 PM. JOP Thu evenings. Broadhead pits and crossbow butts. $125 regular / $165 family / $95 junior / $115 senior. Drop-in $6-10.

post_address: 1245 Chattell Rd (Henry Range); 1979 Dorman Rd (Dorman Range)
post_content: Year-round archery on Central Vancouver Island. Indoor at Nanoose Pentecostal Camp (Sept-May) Mon/Wed 6-8 PM. Outdoor Henry Range 10-70yds and Dorman Range (field course & 3D) 9 AM-8 PM summer. JOP program. $130 regular / $50 junior + $35 key fee. First drop-in free.
business_hours: Indoor: Mon/Wed 6-8 PM; Outdoor: 9 AM-8 PM

post_content: POSSIBLY CLOSED. Facility forced to cease operations Dec 31, 2025 due to federal land divestment. Indoor 20-yard and outdoor 20-70 yard ranges. Community petition of 9,800+ signatures submitted to save the club.
Indoor 18m range with 24/7 key access (6:30 AM-11 PM). JOP program and Tuesday Development Nights. Friday night drop-in $5. $190 adult / $130 junior / $320 family + BCAA fee.
Outdoor target and field ranges with 3D course. 8 AM-sunset for members. Requires own equipment. Membership includes indoor range access. Club shoots and competitive events.

post_address: 160 Barlow Ave (Indoor); Campsite Rd (Outdoor); Sword Ave (Fita)
post_content: North Cariboo archery with provincial championship history. Indoor 18m range, outdoor range, and Fita range. Sat/Sun sessions. Children's archery program (K-12). $5-$10 guest estimate.

post_title: Richmond Rod and Gun Club - Indoor Archery
post_content: Indoor range with drop-in Mon/Wed/Thu/Fri 7:30-9:30 PM. All bow types including crossbow welcome. Beginner Lessons $40 (Mondays including gear). $135-$165 membership. $18 non-member / $6 member / $12 youth drop-in. $12 equipment rental.

One of largest indoor ranges in BC. 18m range with 24 shooting spots, capacity 70 people. Tue-Fri 3:30-8:15 PM, Sat 9:30 AM-6:15 PM, Sun 1:30-6:15 PM, Mon 3:30-6 PM. Intro $35, Family $70, JOP $666.75. $35 yearly membership. $20-$25/hr.

post_address: Behind Fall Fair Grounds (Outdoor); 7091 Kroeker Road (Indoor)
post_content: Year-round archery in Bulkley Valley. Indoor at BV Rod & Gun (Jan-Apr) Mon 6:30-9:30 PM. Outdoor along Bulkley River dawn-dusk. Junior Indoor Archery Program free for members' kids. $57.80 individual / $85.50 family. $10 indoor session fee.

Sea-to-Sky corridor archery. Indoor sessions Wed 7:30-9 PM and Fri 7-9 PM. Outdoor range 9 AM-9 PM daily for members. JOP program with certified instructors. $125 adult resident / $165 non-resident / $190 family. $5 adult / $2 junior drop-in.
business_hours: Indoor: Wed/Fri evenings; Outdoor: 9 AM-9 PM

post_title: Sunshine Coast Rod and Gun Club
post_content: Indoor and outdoor ranges in coastal forest. Sat drop-in 9:30-11:30 AM. Youth program Sat 11:30 AM-1 PM. Members Sun 9:30 AM. $165 adult / $175 bundle / $40 junior / $145 senior. $20 guest + $2 target fee. Equipment rental $10 non-member / $5 member.

post_title: Semiahmoo Fish & Game Club / Semiahmoo Archers
post_content: Indoor and outdoor ranges. Indoor Mon/Thu 7:30-9:30 PM. Outdoor dawn-dusk with 20-70 yard targets. Adult classes, JOP, group events. $120 individual / $150 family / $50 junior / $60 senior. $10 non-member / $5 adult member drop-in.

post_address: Thornhill Junior Secondary (Indoor); 3577 Rifle Range Road (Outdoor)
post_content: Northern BC archery in the Skeena region. Indoor at Thornhill Jr Secondary (Nov-Apr). Outdoor at Rifle Range Road year-round. JOP program. Annual 3D archery competition. Check website for fees.

Stunning outdoor 3D archery at Casino Range with Trail Wildlife Association. Three 3D courses (15 targets each). Dawn-dusk access. Event-based drop-in $10-$20. Youth summer camps. Requires WKA or TWA membership ($20-$40 for events).

UBC campus archery club. Indoor range at Osborne Gym, Mon 5-7 PM during winter terms. Open to students, alumni, and community. $65 alumni/community. $15 non-member drop-in. Equipment provided. Beginner lessons included.

Vancouver's premier traditional and historical archery school. Boutique indoor range specializing in longbow, recurve, and historical shooting styles. Shop Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri 10:30-5:30. Open Range Fri 6:30-8:30 PM ($25 own equipment / $35 rental). Intro class $140. Private $90-$160. Ongoing $249/mo.
POSSIBLY CLOSED. Outdoor range affiliated with Nechako Valley Sporting Association. No current website, email, or phone available. Status uncertain - limited recent online activity.

Victoria's oldest archery club. Outdoor at Carnarvon Park Lacrosse Box (summer) and indoor at Saanich Commonwealth Place (winter). JOP and beginner programs. $115 senior (>25) / $45 junior / $240 family + BCAA/AC fees.
UVic campus archery club. Indoor gym range Wed 1:30-4:30 PM and Fri 3:30-6:30 PM. Open to UVic students. $30 per semester. Equipment provided. Coaching during practice.
Indoor and outdoor ranges at WLSA. Wed 7 PM and Sun 2 PM sessions. JOP Thu evenings. Ladies' archery lessons. WLSA membership (approx $10-$11/mo) + Cariboo Archers fee. $30 JOP fee.
business_hours: Wed 7 PM; Sun 2 PM; JOP Thu

post_title: Nanaimo Fish and Game Club (Archery Division)
post_content: NEW LISTING. Multi-use shooting facility with indoor 20-yard heated archery range and outdoor range. Five nights a week indoor archery during winter. Club established 1905. Drop-in $20/session.

post_title: Campbell River Fish and Wildlife Club (Archery Section)
post_content: NEW LISTING. Archery facilities bordering Elk Falls Provincial Park. 3D archery course with life-size foam animal targets. Beginner instruction Mondays 6-7 PM. Archery access 7 AM-10 PM daily. $125/year archery access fee plus club membership.
business_hours: 7:00 AM - 10:00 PM daily; Beginners Mon 6-7 PM

post_content: NEW LISTING. Expert-led archery academy founded in 2017 offering classes for youth, adults, and families. NCCP Certified Coaches. Weekly outdoor range at school field. Serves Victoria, Langford, and Saanichton. Classes $200. Equipment rental $10.

post_title: Salmon Arm Fish & Game Club (Archery Section)
post_content: NEW LISTING. Active community club with seasonal indoor and outdoor archery ranges plus 3D field courses. 75-metre outdoor range in summer, indoor range in winter. Scheduled shooting 7 AM-9 PM. Hosts 3D archery shoots.

post_title: Vernon Fish and Game Club (Archery Section)
post_content: NEW LISTING. Multi-use shooting facility 4 km from Highway 6 near Lavington with dedicated archery bag course and practice range. Hosts public events including National Range Day.
NEW LISTING. Not-for-profit outdoor archery field for practice in the Kelowna area. Limited public information available; contact via Facebook.

NEW LISTING. Specialized mounted (horseback) archery sports club founded in 2021 offering instruction from beginner ground archers to competitive mounted competitors under HARCAN. Weekly practices Wednesdays at 5:30 PM near Kelowna airport.

NEW LISTING. Members-only shooting facility with indoor archery range. Summer hours 8 AM-8 PM, winter 8 AM-4 PM. Non-member guests $5 range time + $5 day pass. Currently not accepting new memberships.
business_hours: Summer 8 AM-8 PM; Winter 8 AM-4 PM

post_title: Mission & District Rod & Gun Club (Archery Section)
post_content: NEW LISTING. Private members club featuring a highly regarded 40-target 3D archery trail, considered one of the best in the Fraser Valley. Open 9 AM to dusk, 7 days/week. Multiple shooting disciplines available.

post_title: Lake Windermere District Rod & Gun Club (Archery Range)
post_content: NEW LISTING. Community shooting facility with 100+ year history serving the Columbia Valley. Static archery range 15-60 yards plus 15-target 3D course set up seasonally from early May. Members $4/day, non-members $10/day. Equipment rental $10/day.
business_hours: Dawn to dusk; Volunteers Sun/Wed 6-8 PM (May-Aug)

post_title: Golden District Rod & Gun Club (Archery Section)
post_content: NEW LISTING. 40-hectare recreation shooting range facility overlooking the Purcell Mountains, about 13 km from Golden. Covered archery range with field point targets at 20, 30, 40, 50, 60 yards. Open 8 AM-8 PM daily.

post_title: CNT Rod and Gun Club (Archery Section)
post_content: NEW LISTING. Non-profit organization founded in 1974 in the North Thompson Valley. Offers archery range, rifle range, and trap shooting. Hosts 3D archery shoots. Membership renewal in April.

post_title: North Thompson Fish and Game Club (Archery Section)
post_content: NEW LISTING. Founded 2009, serving hunters and anglers with a full-service gun and archery range. Archery meets Thursdays at 6 PM. $90 individual / $100 family membership plus $10/year key rental.

NEW LISTING. Family-friendly archery club typically meeting Tuesday and Thursday nights. Historically 20-40 archers on meeting nights. Hosts four special archery shoots annually. Current facility location uncertain after relocation around 2020.
